## Module / Phase

Which module or phase does this feedback apply to?

- [ ] Prerequisite Module 1 — Understanding AI
- [ ] Prerequisite Module 2 — First AI Tools
- [ ] Prerequisite Module 3 — Prompt Engineering
- [ ] Prerequisite Module 4 — Security & Ethics
- [ ] Prerequisite Module 5 — AI Strategy
- [ ] Prerequisite Module 6 — Pre-Work
- [ ] Deep Dive Phase 1 — Foundation
- [ ] Deep Dive Phase 2 — Visual & Creative
- [ ] Deep Dive Phase 3 — Automation
- [ ] Deep Dive Phase 4 — Custom Agents
- [ ] Deep Dive Phase 5 — AI Strategy
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Assessments
- [ ] Facilitator Guide
- [ ] README / Documentation

## Type of Feedback

- [ ] Factual correction (something is wrong or outdated)
- [ ] Content addition (something important is missing)
- [ ] Clarity improvement (something is confusing)
- [ ] Exercise improvement (an exercise doesn't work as described)
- [ ] Tool change (a tool has changed, been discontinued, or replaced)

## Description

Describe the issue or suggestion clearly:

## Suggested Change

What should it say instead, or what should be added?

## Context

How did you discover this? (e.g., running the course with participants, personal use, tool update)
